---
title: "Projects"
---

A selection of quantitative finance and software projects completed during my studies at the University of Alberta.

::::::::::::::::::::::: project-grid
:::::: project-card
::: project-label
QTP · Fin-452
:::

<h5><a href="projects/Alex_Hirtle_1719121.html">WTI Options Portfolio: Full Greek P&L Attribution</a></h5>

<p>Simulation of an energy trading desk risk role. Constructs a complete Greek P&L attribution framework — Delta, Gamma, Vega, Vanna, and Theta — for a portfolio of WTI crude oil options on NYMEX CL futures. Prices options using Black-Scholes and models realistic scenario shifts across underlying price, implied volatility, and time decay.</p>

::: tech-tags
[R]{.tech-tag} [Black-Scholes]{.tech-tag} [Options Pricing]{.tech-tag} [Risk Attribution]{.tech-tag}
:::

::: project-link
<a href="projects/Alex_Hirtle_1719121.html">View Report →</a>
:::
::::::

:::::: project-card
::: project-label
QTP · Fin-452
:::

<h5><a href="projects/QTP.html">Momentum-Based Sector Rotation Strategy</a></h5>

<p>Dollar-neutral long-short strategy across the 11 SPDR S&P 500 sector ETFs. Applies Kalman filtering to smooth rolling momentum, volatility, and Sharpe ratio features, then uses hierarchical clustering (Ward's D2) to generate monthly rebalance signals. Evaluated over a 24-year training window and out-of-sample period with a full parameter grid search.</p>

::: tech-tags
[R]{.tech-tag} [Kalman Filter]{.tech-tag} [Hierarchical Clustering]{.tech-tag} [Backtesting]{.tech-tag} [Momentum]{.tech-tag}
:::

::: project-link
<a href="projects/QTP.html">View Report →</a>
:::
::::::

:::::: project-card
::: project-label
Options Analysis · Fin-452
:::

<h5><a href="projects/p1-options_greeks.html">Options Greeks Analysis</a></h5>

<p>Foundational analysis of options pricing sensitivities through the Greeks framework. Examines Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega, and Rho across varying strike, maturity, and volatility conditions for WTI crude oil options. Includes Greek surface visualizations and explores their practical use in hedging and position risk management.</p>

::: tech-tags
[R]{.tech-tag} [Options Greeks]{.tech-tag} [Black-Scholes]{.tech-tag} [Hedging]{.tech-tag}
:::

::: project-link
<a href="projects/p1-options_greeks.html">View Report →</a>
:::
::::::

:::::: project-card
::: project-label
Shiny App · Fin-451
:::

<h5><a href="https://github.com/PassiveAlex/Fin-451-Golem" target="_blank">Energy Risk Dashboard</a></h5>

<p>Production-grade Shiny dashboard built with the Golem framework for energy commodity risk managers. Covers WTI (Cushing & Houston), Brent, Heating Oil, RBOB, and Natural Gas futures. Modules include forward curve analysis, rolling minimum-variance hedge ratios with basis risk decomposition, GARCH volatility regimes, EIA petroleum fundamentals, and U.S. Treasury yield curves. EIA and FRED data refresh nightly via GitHub Actions.</p>

::: tech-tags
[R]{.tech-tag} [Shiny]{.tech-tag} [Golem]{.tech-tag} [Docker]{.tech-tag} [GitHub Actions]{.tech-tag} [EIA API]{.tech-tag}
:::

::: project-link
<a href="https://github.com/PassiveAlex/Fin-451-Golem" target="_blank">View on GitHub →</a>
:::
::::::

:::::: project-card
::: project-label
Valuation · NPV\@Risk
:::

<h5><a href="projects/Upgrader_Master_Document.html">Upgrader Project Valuation — Suncor</a></h5>

<p>Full valuation of a \$2B Cold Lake Bitumen-to-Synthetic Crude upgrader investment for Suncor using NPV\@Risk methodology. Models the SYN-CL upgrading spread with an Ornstein-Uhlenbeck with Jumps (OUJ) stochastic process, simulating 20 years of monthly cash flows across thousands of scenarios. Stress tests include geopolitical shocks, government-backed hydrocracking, and escalating carbon taxation.</p>

::: tech-tags
[R]{.tech-tag} [Monte Carlo]{.tech-tag} [Ornstein-Uhlenbeck]{.tech-tag} [DCF]{.tech-tag} [Energy Finance]{.tech-tag}
:::

::: project-link
<a href="projects/Upgrader_Master_Document.html">View Report →</a>
:::
::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::
